title: Derp's Optimization
description: Easy optimization, customizability, and more to the game! Intended to speed up slower PC's.
body:
# Derp's Optimization
Derp's Optimization is a modpack designed to give the best performance on any device! For both old and new computers, the pack gives increase frames per second, less lag, less resources wated, and a better visual and audial flow! 

The pack is good in **ANY** situation, be you playing in a massive server like Hypixel or just playing alone or with friends, this pack will give *YOU* the experience you deserve. With mods such as Simple Voice Chat for ease of communication, Sodium for general enhancement, and ReplayMod to go back and look at what has passed, Derp's Optimization is **THE** modpack for you.
